commentary_text: The model favors Spain at 48%, while the sportsbook consensus favors France at 42%. This 19-percentage-point gap on the France win is the largest divergence. The draw probability is nearly identical across sources around 29%. Recent form, injury status, or lineup changes since the model's last update could account for a material shift in confidence around France's prospects. The dashboard flags this disagreement as a signal worth monitoring rather than evidence that either source has correctly priced the match.
